name: iamhumans
description: Humanization layer for LLM conversation. v2.2.0: 57 net-new culture-grounded rules across 5 cultural clusters (East Asian, MENA, African/diasporic, Latin/Latinx, SE Asian/Buddhist) from 31 sources. 238 rules total. 20 personality modules + 5 cultural affect clusters. 240-case eval corpus. Eval-verified: 99/100 PASS, 96.3/100 aggregate.
